videos.headline: Abdul Janneh gets open for an easy Georgia Tech TD
videos.description: Abdul Janneh gets behind Wake Forest's defense and brings in a 33-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Abdul Janneh gets open for an easy Georgia Tech TD) 2023/09/23 ESHEET
